creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Pat Maddox from comment #2)

I'm aware of, but don't use, <https://ci.freebsd.org/>. Re: Jenkins at this address, I see pages such as <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Jenkins>. 

I stumbled across <https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/> through discussions in FreeBSD Forums. For much of what's linked from there, you'll need an ISP that supports TCP/IPv6. If your ISP lacks this support, you might use a tunnel; I chose Hurricane Electric after it was mentioned in FreeBSD Forums.
